heading: Relationship to Privacy Act and Freedom of Information Act
label: 4355 Relationship to Privacy Act and Freedom of Information Act

children.heading: Privacy Act
children.label: a Privacy Act
children.text: Nothing in this chapter may be construed as requiring the public disclosure of records or portions of records protected under (relating to the privacy of personal records).section 552a of title 5

Except as provided in paragraph (2), no record (or portion thereof) shall be excluded from publication in the FRUS series under , or exempted from the declassification requirement of , solely by virtue of the application of (relating to the exemption of certain matters from freedom of information requirements).section 4353 of this titlesection 4354 of this titlesection 552(b) of title 5

Records described in (relating to visa records) shall be excluded from publication in the FRUS series under and, to the extent applicable, exempted from the declassification requirement of .section 1202(f) of title 8section 4353 of this titlesection 4354 of this title
